fields.description: Disable only for controlled administrator troubleshooting.

fields.description: Rate limit window in seconds. Default is 3600 seconds, or 1 hour.
fields.label: Window Seconds

fields.description: Maximum PDF reference uploads per user per window.
fields.label: Upload PDF Limit

fields.description: Maximum OCR runs per user per window.
fields.label: Run OCR Limit

fields.description: Maximum preview generations per user per window.

fields.description: Maximum layout saves per user per window.

fields.description: Maximum finalization attempts per user per window.
fields.label: Finalize Limit

fields.description: Maximum output generations per user per window.

fields.description: Maximum return-to-editing actions per user per window.
fields.label: Return to Editing Limit
